en.text: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) in the camel yards (the places where the camels are stationed)

ar.text: حَدَّثَنَا صَدَقَةُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ، قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَيَّانَ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ، عَنْ نَافِعٍ، قَالَ رَأَيْتُ ابْنَ عُمَرَ يُصَلِّي إِلَى بَعِيرِهِ وَقَالَ رَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم يَفْعَلُهُ‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton Nafiu: E pashë Ibn Omerin duke falur namazin ndërsa e kishte vendosur devenë e tij si sutra para vetes, dhe ai tha: "E kam parë Pejgamberin (s.a.v.s.) duke vepruar kështu."

en.text: "I saw Ibn `Umar praying while taking his camel as a Sutra in front of him and he said, "I saw the Prophet doing the same."
